chapter_title.ar: بَابُ كِفَايَةِ الْعِيَالِ وَ التَّوَسُّعِ عَلَيْهِمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 54 – Adequacy for the dependants and extending upon them

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/138)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/138)
text: مِنْ سَعَادَةِ الرَّجُلِ أَنْ يَكُونَ الْقَيِّمَ عَلَى عِيَالِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Murazim, from Moaz Bin Kaseer,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said, ‘It is from the good fortune of the man that he happens to be the overseer upon his dependants’.
en.sarwar: 13. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Murazim from Mu’adh ibn Kathir who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that it is of the prosperity of man to support and provide for his family.”
